label: Apply-to-review downgrade discovery case
profileText: Marketing student targeting full-time marketing roles in New York City. Experience with campaign execution, reporting, content calendars, Excel, Google Analytics, Canva, and PowerPoint. Class of 2026. Wants full-time work in NYC and no contract roles.
jobText: Brand Marketing Associate based in New York City. Full-time contract role supporting campaign execution, reporting, content calendars, stakeholder updates, performance tracking, and cross-functional coordination. Required tools include Excel and Google Analytics. Preferred tools include Power BI and Tableau. Posting notes 3+ years of experience preferred.
